subcodes.title: Words to the Master's entourage, spoken on 1912-09-24
subcodes.first_line: Behold the power and confirmation of the Blessed Beauty: The pastor comes in person with all humility to invite us
subcodes.first_line_orig: ملاحظهٴ قدرت و تأیید جمال مبارک نمائید که کشیش خود میآید و بتمام خضوع ما را دعوت می کند
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
